metadata.description: 環境名（リソース名の接頭辞に使用）
コンテナイメージ名（azd が自動設定する）

projectEndpoint.value: [format('https://{0}.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/{1}', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourceGroup, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'ai-foundry'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourceGroup, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'ai-project'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value)]

variables.containerEnv: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'SERVE_STATIC', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'MODEL_NAME', 'value', parameters('modelName')), createObject('name', 'ENVIRONMENT', 'value', 'production')), if(not(empty(parameters('projectEndpoint'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('projectEndpoint'))), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('contentSafetyEndpoint'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'CONTENT_SAFETY_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('contentSafetyEndpoint'))), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('cosmosDbEndpoint'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'COSMOS_DB_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('cosmosDbEndpoint'))), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('apimGatewayUrl'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'APIM_GATEWAY_URL', 'value', parameters('apimGatewayUrl'))), createArray()))]

properties.value: <policies><inbound><base /><rate-limit calls="60" renewal-period="60" /><set-header name="X-Request-Id" exists-action="skip"><value>@(context.RequestId.ToString())</value></set-header><llm-content-safety><input><text threshold="Medium" categories="Hate,SelfHarm,Sexual,Violence" /><jailbreak enabled="true" /><indirect-attack enabled="true" /></input></llm-content-safety></inbound><backend><base /></backend><outbound><base /><set-header name="X-Gateway" exists-action="override"><value>travel-marketing-ai-gateway</value></set-header><llm-content-safety><output><text threshold="Medium" categories="Hate,SelfHarm,Sexual,Violence" /></output></llm-content-safety></outbound><on-error><base /></on-error></policies>

body.message: 承認後アクションを開始しました

AZURE_AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT.value: [format('https://{0}.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/{1}', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourceGroup, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'ai-foundry'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourceGroup, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'ai-project'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value)]
